title: 9 Creams to Help Hypertensive Men with Erectile Dysfunction and Improve Health
description: Ginkgo biloba creams for erectile dysfunction are a topical solution that may help alleviate symptoms. Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. These compounds improve blood flow by dilating blood vessels and reducing inflammation. This increased blood flow to the penis can lead to improved erections.
